stemHtml: F-GTPO is beyond Lille Approach's range. Bigjet 347 is asked to relay a frequency change to Paris Control on 128.055. What does Bigjet 347 transmit?

options.a: "F-GTPO, Bigjet 347, Lille Approach requests you to call 128.055"
options.b: "Bigjet 347 relaying Lille Approach for F-GTPO, contact Paris Control 128.05"
options.c: "Bigjet 347 relaying Lille Approach for F-GTPO, call Paris Control 128.055"
options.d: "F-GTPO, Bigjet 347, Lille Approach requests you to contact Paris Control 128.055"
